member.name: T:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PicoBlade2
member.summary: LaserPicoBlade2 Partial Member Variable

member.name: T:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PicoBlade2.enumFaultStatus
member.summary: Module 단위

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.TURN_LASER_EMISSION
member.summary:
Turn Laser Emission
*S1!ON00000n# n=0 OFF, n=1 ON , n=2 TestMode

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FAULTS_STATUS
member.summary:
Set Clearable errors ＆ Warning Clear *SO!FS000000#
Getting *S0?FSzzzzzz#
*S0FSnnnnnn# nnnnnn = 0 → No errors nnnnnn 〉 0 → At least one faulty
Bit0: Safety module
Bit1: Voltage monitor module
Bit2: Firmware monitor module
Bit3: Laser module
Bit5: Amp1 module
Bit6: Seeder module
Bit7: Amp2 module
Bit8: P.A. module
Bit14: Pulse picker module nnnnnn = 999999 → unknown module error

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FULL_CONTROLLER_RESET
member.summary:
Enforce Full HW Reset Of Controller
*SO!RE000000#

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.COMM_LOGGING_SPEED
member.summary:
*S0!LSnnnnnn#
nnnnnn = 0 ~ 180 nnnnnn = 0→ logging disabled

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.COMM_RECORD
member.summary: Enforces RS-232 Record (Logging Line) or Full Controller Settings Printout n = 0 -> Single Record , n = 1 -> Complete Settings n = 2 -> Records’ Title , n = 3 -> Records’ Subtitle

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.SYNC_MODE_ENABLE
member.summary:
SYNC mode [optional] enabled
*S0!SY00000n# n = 0 -> SYNC mode disabled ,n = 1 → SYNC mode enabled

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.DIVIDER_PRF
member.summary:
Divider for Pulse Repetition Frequency
*S1!PDnnnnnn# Sets Divider for PRF PRF = RR / nnnnnn

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.PRF
member.summary:
Pulse Repetition Frequency
*S1!PFaabbbb# Sets PRF PRF = aa.bbbb MHz

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FIX_BURST_SIZE
member.summary:
actual burst size
*S1!BT0000nn# Sets (fix) Burst to nn = 01…40

summary.para: Get S1FB00000n# → n = 0 Fix Burst is active , n 〉 0 FlexBurst is active

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.SAVE_FLEX_BURST
member.summary: *S0!FB00000n# Saves FlexBurst as n = ＃1…＃8

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.LOAD_MAIN_SET
member.summary: *S1!MS0000nn# Loads Main Set nn = ＃01…＃10 → PRF ＆ (Fix/Flex)Burst ＆ PoD

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.SAVE_MAIN_SET
member.summary: *S0!MS0000nn# Saves Main Set as nn = ＃01…＃10 → PRF ＆ (Fix/Flex)Burst ＆ PoD

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.GAIN_SPEC_PULSE_IN_FLEXBURST
member.summary: *S1!PG0ppnnn# gain = nnn (0..999) of pulse #pp

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.ENABLE_POD_N_HW_GATING
member.summary: *S1!PBa0000n# a=HwGating , n = Enable Pod 0: Disable 1:Enable

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.DRIVIDER_FOR_POD
member.summary: *S1!DPnnnnnn# PoD divider = nnnnnn

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.OUTPUT_POWER_FOR_POD
member.summary: *S1!AO00nnnn# Relative IR Output Power = nnnn [%o]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.SHUTTER
member.summary:
Position of Shutter
*S1!SH00000n# n = 2 → enforce shutter closing, n 〈 2 → release shutter
Getting
*S1SH00000n# → n = 1 → Shutter is closed , n = 0 → Shutter is open

summary.para: *S1!OP00100n# Enables Level triggering (sampled at rising edge of PRF out) of PoD
*S1!OP00200n# Enables Edge triggering (any low to high transition) of PoD
*S1!OP00500n# Enables external analog modulation of PoD(SMA connector PoD A in)
*S1!OP00600n# Sets the analog modulation range of PoD (SMA connector PoD A in), n=1 → 5V , n=0 → 10V
*S1!OP01000n# Enables the modulation of the PRF out by the PoD divider
*S1!OP01100n# Enables the modulation of the PRF out by the PoD on/off signal

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FIRMWARE_VERSION
member.summary:
Get Firmware Version *S0?VSzzzzzz#
Getting *S0VSnnnmmm# , Version = n.nn , Build=mmm

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.BOOTLOADER_VERSION
member.summary:
Boot loader Version *S0?VFzzzzzz#
Getting *S0VSnnnmmm# , Version = n.nn , Build=mmm

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.COTROLLER_SERIAL_NUM
member.summary:
Serial Number of Controller *S0?SNzzzzzz#
Getting *S0SNnnnnnn# , S/N = nnnnnn

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.LASERHEAD_SERIAL_NUM
member.summary:
Serial Number of LaserHead *S1?SNzzzzzz#
Getting *S1SNnnnnnn# , S/N = nnnnnn

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.CURRENT_TEC_SEEDER_PUMP_DIODE
member.summary:
current of TEC seeder pump diode *D2?IT#
Getting *D2ITnnnnnn# or *D2IT-nnnnnn#
Heating Current (positive value)= nnnnnn [mA]
Cooling Current (negative value)= -nnnnnn [mA]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.VOLTAGE_TEC_SEEDER_PUMP_DIODE
member.summary:
voltage of TEC seeder pump diode *D2?UT#
Getting *D2UTnnnnnn# or *D2UT-nnnnnn#
Heating Voltage (positive value)= nnnnnn [mA]
Cooling Voltage (negative value)= -nnnnnn [mA]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.PHOTO_DIODE_MONITORING_OSC_INTRA_POWER
member.summary:
DC signal from photo diode monitoring oscillator intracavity power
Getting *S1LDnnnnnn# → Current = nnnnnn [µA]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.COLTROLLER_TEMP
member.summary:
controller temperature *S0?TC#
Getting *S0TCaaabbb# , → Temperature = aaa.bbb [°C]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.AMP1_DIODE_TEMP
member.summary:
measured Amp1 diode temperature *D1?TC#
Getting *D1TCaaabbb# → Temperature = aaa.bbb[°C]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.SEEDER_DIODE_TEMP
member.summary:
measured seeder diode temperature *D2?TC#
Getting *D2TCaaabbb# , → Temperature = aaa.bbb [°C]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.AMP2_DIODE_TEMP
member.summary:
measured Amp2 diode temperature *D3?TC#
Getting *D3TCaaabbb# → Temperature = aaa.bbb[°C]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.POWER_AMP_DIODE_TEMP
member.summary:
measured power amplifier diode temperature *D4?TC#
Getting *D3TCaaabbb# → Temperature = aaa.bbb[°C]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.SYSTEM_PARTS_TEMP
member.summary:
measure temperature
SET *S1?TCnnnnnn#
nnnnnn=000001 HeatSink
nnnnnn=000002 AD-3 board
Getting *S1TCaaabbb# → Temperature = aaa.bbb[°C]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.PHOTO_DIODE_MONITORING
member.summary:
DC signal from photo diode monitoring
SET *S0CUnnnnnn#
nnnnnn=000010 ,DC signal from photoDiode monitoring seeder pump diode
nnnnnn=000012 ,DC signal from photoDiode monitoring Amp1 fiber Output
nnnnnn=000013 ,DC signal from photoDiode monitoring Amp2 fiber Output
nnnnnn=000031 ,DC signal from photoDiode monitoring PA fiber Output
nnnnnn=000032 ,DC signal from photoDiode monitoring IR Power After PoD
Getting *S0CUnnnnnn# → Current = nnnnnn[µA]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.OUTPUT_POWER
member.summary:
measured output power *S1?MP#
Getting *S1MPnnnnnn# → Power = nnnnnn [mW]

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FAULT_STATUS_SAFETY_MODELE
member.summary:
error status of safety module *S2?FSzzzzzz#
nnnnnn = 0 → No errors , nnnnnn > 0 → At least one error ,present in this module. (Laser Emission will stop automatically.)
Module errors are binary coded. Binary(nnnnnn): Bit0…Bit18.
Bit0: Remote interlock
Bit1: Cover interlock
Bit2: Shutter does not open
Bit3: Shutter does not close
Bit4: Shutter sensor
Bit6: PB2 controller
fan/overtemperature
Bit7: ACDC block fan/overtemperature
Bit9: Remote control
Bit10: NV memory write

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.SEEDER_FAULT_STATUS_LASER_DIODE_MODULE
member.summary:
error status of laser diode module
nnnnnn = 0 → No errors , nnnnnn > 0 → At least one error ,present in this module. (Laser Emission will stop automatically.)
Module errors are binary coded. Binary(nnnnnn): Bit0…Bit18.
Bit0: Fiber monitor
Bit1: Under current
Bit2: Over current
Bit3: Current spike
Bit5: Driver #1
Bit6: Driver #2
Bit7: Driver #3
Bit8: Driver #4
Bit9: Driver #5
Bit10: Bad NV memory parameter
Bit11: Under temperature
Bit12: Over temperature
Bit13: Temperature deviation

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FAULT_STATUS_LASER_MODULE
member.summary:
error status of laser module *S1?FSzzzzzz#
nnnnnn = 0 → No errors , nnnnnn > 0 → At least one error ,present in this module. (Laser Emission will stop automatically.)
Module errors are binary coded. Binary(nnnnnn): Bit0…Bit18.
Bit0: Heat sink under temperature
Bit1: Heat sink over temperature
Bit2: data link to laser box
Bit3: PLL unlocked
Bit4: Qswitching
Bit6: low LaserDC

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FAULT_STATUS_VOLTAGE_MONITOR_MODULE
member.summary:
error status of voltage monitor module
nnnnnn = 0 → No errors , nnnnnn > 0 → At least one error ,present in this module. (Laser Emission will stop automatically.)
Module errors are binary coded. Binary(nnnnnn): Bit0…Bit18.
Bit0: Voltage #1
Bit1: Voltage #2
Bit2: Voltage #3
...
Bit17: Voltage #18
Bit18: Voltage #19

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.FAULT_STATUS_FIRMWARE_MONITOR_MODULE
member.summary:
error status of firmware monitor module
nnnnnn = 0 → No errors , nnnnnn > 0 → At least one error ,present in this module. (Laser Emission will stop automatically.) nnnnnn = Decimal code of firmware error

member.name: F:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.PICO_BLADE2_CMD.LAST_WARNING
member.summary: nnnnnn = 0 → No warnings nnnnnn = Decimal code of last warning

summary.para: 같은 네임스페이스에 선언이 되어있어야 확장 메서드를 쓸수 있다.

member.name: M:EzIna.Laser.Lumentum.EnumHelper.GetAttributesFrom``1(System.Enum)
member.summary: Attribute Generic Function
